channel.title: Download free software, update daily!

item.title: Download Format Factory 5.22.0
item.description: Format Factory is a file conversion software, multifunction such as video conversion, audio, document, image. It is a lightweight software that contains multi-function for developers. The great thing is that Format Factory has a fast-switching speed, the ability to recover the broken file and the high output quality. FormatFactory is a free software-free software conversion that is able to convert video files, audio, and images. It also has the ability to extract DVDs and CDs to other...

item.title: Download Monkeys Audio 12.52
item.description: Monkey\'s Audio is software that compresses digital music without loss of quality. Supports high quality WAV files and CD ripping. Monkeys Audio will compress .wav tracks into .ape files to reduce their size without loss of sound quality, decompress .ape, convert files, check file integrity and manage tags. Unlike traditional methods like MP3 and OGG, which permanently remove quality to save space, Monkey\'s Audio only creates perfect copies with the same sound quality as the originals....

item.title: Download ConvertAll 1.0.3
item.description: ConvertAll is another unit converter. But it's possible to combine units any way you want. If you want to convert from inches per decade, that's fine. Or from meters to pounds. Or from cubic nautical miles. Units don't necessarily make sense to anyone else. Features of ConvertAll Base units for conversion can be entered (with auto-completion) or selected from a list. When entering a unit, the unit list is automatically filtered to show only units with matching words. In general,...

item.title: Download WinScript 2.1.2

It includes scripts for debugging, privacy, performance, and more, along with the ability to install all your favorite apps with just one click.
